name: Impossible Ham 'n Swiss Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Fully cooked ham, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Grease a 10 x 1-1/2 inch pie plate.
3. Sprinkle ham, cheese and onions evenly over the bottom of the pie plate.
4. In a blender or bowl, beat eggs with milk until smooth for about 15 seconds (blender on high) or 1 minute (hand beater).
5. Pour the egg mixture into the pie plate.
6. Bake until golden brown and a knife inserted in the center comes out clean, about 35-40 minutes.
7. Allow to cool for 5 minutes before serving.
